phase_1.gps_motion: GPS signal strength inconsistent at start (2.7m error margin), achieving 3.2m lock after stabilization. Accelerometer readings show user quickly becoming immobile and remaining seated throughout.

phase_2.correlations: Positional settling (GPS convergence) corresponds to kinetic patterns. Acoustic consistency observed.
phase_2.holistic_assessment: Session analysis reveals concentration impediments: noisy setting (37.5 dB), unsettled user state.

phase_3.recommendations: Moderate session length adequate; potential to extend to 264s for skill building.
